articles.title: Shiba Inu Price Prediction as Meme Coins Take Off – Is Now a Good Entry Point on SHIB?
articles.description: Shiba Inu (SHIB), the world’s second-largest meme coin by market capitalization, is going sideways in the $0.0000087 area, with the 21-Day Moving Average (DMA) having acted as a magnet to the price action for the last three days.... Read More: Shiba Inu Price Prediction as Meme Coins Take Off – Is Now a Good Entry Point on SHIB?

articles.title: Pro-XRP Lawyer Alleges Lack of Approval by SEC Ethics Office For Hinman’s Speech
articles.description: Attorney John Deaton, known for his pro-XRP stance, has disclosed that the SEC’s Ethics Office did not approve William Hinman’s controversial speech. The former director of SEC’s Corporation Finance, Hinman, made remarks in 2018 classifying Bitcoin and Ethereum as non-securities but failing to mention XRP. Related Reading: BREAKING: Bitcoin Mining Industry Spared From 30% Tax […]

articles.title: Optimism set to unlock $587M worth of OP tokens, will investors unload?
articles.description: More than 386 million OP tokens are scheduled to be unlocked on May 31, more than doubling the total circulating supply.
